name: Whey Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and mix it with baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Work in the shortening using your fingertips or two spatulas until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add whey to form a soft, pliable dough. If needed, adjust with additional whey.
4. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead briefly.
5. Pat the dough into a 3/4-inch thick sheet.
6. Cut the sheet into biscuits using a floured cutter.
7. Place the biscuits on an oiled baking sheet.
8. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
10 servings. Olive C. Leary, Hastings, MI.
